nodes.name: Tachyspiza
nodes.summary: Tachyspiza（Tachyspiza）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联27种鸟类，如Frances's sparrowhawk、Spot-tailed sparrowhawk、Grey-headed goshawk等27种鸟类。

nodes.name: Spot-tailed sparrowhawk
nodes.summary: Spot-tailed sparrowhawk（Tachyspiza trinotata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Spot-tailed sparrowhawk。

nodes.name: Spot-tailed sparrowhawk
nodes.summary: The spot-tailed sparrowhawk or spot-tailed goshawk (Tachyspiza trinotata) is a species of bird of prey in the family, Accipitridae. It was formerly placed in the genus Accipiter. It is endemic to Sulawesi in Indonesia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical mangrove forest. Description It has a length of 26-30 cm and a wingspan of 45-51 cm. References
